---
title: "ts-agents docs"
---

`ts-agents` is a CLI-first toolkit for time-series analysis and agent automation.
It wraps statistical forecasting methods, sandboxed code execution, and
LLM-driven agents behind a single `ts-agents` command so you can go from raw
data to evaluated forecasts without writing glue code.

These docs capture the project's durable design choices so interfaces can evolve
without rewriting the core toolchain.

## Get Started

1. [Quickstart](quickstart.qmd) — install and run your first command in under a minute
2. [CLI Examples](cli-examples.qmd) — practical CLI patterns by example
3. [Walkthroughs](walkthroughs.qmd) — step-by-step guides for the built-in demos

## Learn More

- [Skills Guide](skills-guide.qmd) — using, customizing, and creating skills
- [Design](philosophy.qmd) — why the project is structured around a stable CLI contract
- [Distribution](distribution.qmd) — packaging, release, and publishing workflow

---

[Conference talk slides](talks/ts_agents_talk.qmd) are also available.
